fields.name: receive_status
fields.comment: 收货状态{0:未收货,1:部分收货,2:全部收货}

fields.name: return_status
fields.comment: 退货状态{0:未退货,1:部分退货,2:全部退货,3:退货中}

fields.name: settlement_status
fields.comment: 入账状态 0 未进入1部分进入 2 全部入账

fields.name: sup_sub_code
fields.comment: 供应商发货单子单编号

fields.name: express_nos
fields.comment: 快递单号，多个以逗号分隔（英文逗号）

fields.name: receive_status
fields.comment: 收货状态{0:待收货,1:已收货,2:已拒收}

fields.name: return_status
fields.comment: 退货状态{0:待退货,1:部分退货,2:全部退货,3:退货中}

fields.name: send_order_type
fields.comment: 发货单类型(SEND:发货单SERVICE:交付单)

fields.name: stop_auto_receive
fields.comment: 停止自动收货0:不停止 1:停止

fields.name: invoice_type
fields.comment: 发票类型{0:普通发票,1:增值发票}

fields.name: status
fields.comment: 订单状态{DRAFT草稿,NEW新建,CONFIRMED已确认,PROCESSED已处理,DONE已完成,CANCEL已取消,REJECTED:已拒绝}

fields.name: send_status
fields.comment: 发货状态{0:未发货,1:部分发货,2:全部发货}

fields.name: receive_status
fields.comment: 收货状态{0:待收货,1:部分收货,2:全部收货,3全部取消}

fields.name: audit_status
fields.comment: 审批状态{0:未审批,1:待审批,2:审批中,3:审批通过,4:审批驳回}

fields.name: sup_status
fields.comment: 供应商订单状态{0:未创建,1:创建中,2:创建成功,3:创建失败}

fields.name: sub_status
fields.comment: 1创建: 101 创建中, 102 创建成功, 103 创建失败, 2提交: 201 提交中, 202 提交成功, 203 提交失败

fields.name: advance_status
fields.comment: 预付状态 0:无预付 1:待预付 2:部分预付 3:全部预付

fields.name: is_deleted
fields.comment: 逻辑删除标识{0:未删除,1:已删除}

fields.name: logistics_status
fields.comment: 物流状态{UNSHIPPED:待发货，UNRECEIVED:待收货,COMPLETE:已完成，CANCEL:已取消,REJECTED:已拒绝}

fields.name: enable_payment_stage
fields.comment: 是否开启付款阶段 0不开启，1开启

fields.name: update_scene
fields.comment: 订单变更来源 1：来源于订单 2：来源于合同

fields.name: display
fields.comment: 是否显示单次订单：1显示，0不显示

fields.name: freight
fields.comment: 是否开启运费：1开启，0不开启

fields.name: receive_control_type
fields.comment: 超量接收控制类型 1--禁止提交 2--提醒 3--不提醒

fields.name: status
fields.comment: 状态{DRAFT草稿,NEW新建,CONFIRMED已确认,REJECTED:已拒绝,PROCESSED已处理,DONE已完成,CANCEL已取消}

fields.name: send_status
fields.comment: 发货状态{0:待发货,1:部分发货,2:全部发货}

fields.name: receive_status
fields.comment: 收货状态{0:待收货,1:部分收货,2:全部收货}

fields.name: freeze_status
fields.comment: 冻结状态{0:未冻结,1:部分冻结,2:全部冻结}

fields.name: is_deleted
fields.comment: 逻辑删除状态{0:未删除,1:已删除}

fields.name: budget_type
fields.comment: 预算类型 0：部门，1：项目，2：个人

fields.name: multi_recv_type
fields.comment: 多步收货类型(1:一步收货 2:两步收货)

fields.name: agent_org_name
fields.comment: 采购组织(采购员所在的组织)

fields.name: agent_company_org_code
fields.comment: 采购员的公司级部门(采购单位)编号

fields.name: agent_company_org_name
fields.comment: 采购员的公司级部门(采购单位)名称

fields.name: source_scene
fields.comment: 来源场景 1订单、2寻源、3申请
